mapper.select: select id as supplierId, name as supplierName, furigana as supplierFurigana, is_deleted as supplierIsDeleted, register_date_time as supplierRegisterDateTime, update_date_time as supplierUpdateDateTime from m_supplier where is_deleted != 1 order by id asc

select id as supplierId, name as supplierName, furigana as supplierFurigana, is_deleted as supplierIsDeleted, register_date_time as supplierRegisterDateTime, update_date_time as supplierUpdateDateTime from m_supplier where id = #{supplierId} and is_deleted != 1

select id as supplierId, name as supplierName, furigana as supplierFurigana, is_deleted as supplierIsDeleted, register_date_time as supplierRegisterDateTime, update_date_time as supplierUpdateDateTime from m_supplier where is_deleted != 1 and ( id like concat('%' , #{search} , '%') or name like concat('%' , #{search} , '%') or furigana like concat('%' , #{search} , '%') ) order by ${sortItem} ${sort}
mapper.update: update m_supplier set name = #{supplierName}, furigana = #{supplierFurigana} where id = #{supplierId}
